productDisplayName: John Miller Men Blue Checks Shirts
description: Composition White half sleeves shirt with blue checks, made of 60% polyester, 30% cotton and 10% linen, has a patch pocket on the left chest, rolled cuff, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash at 40 C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal Hot iron When it's Thursday and you want to wear something that's not formal, but not casual either, try this semi-formal shirt from john miller. Mixed with linen, this shirt looks fresh and crisp, and will keep you cool all day long. Pair it with corduroys for a relaxed look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
